## Checklist

- [ ] No `localhost` references
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] ESLint passes
- [ ] Core modules load without errors
- [ ] JSON content files are valid
- [ ] Tested on target domain(s)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
